payload.summary_zh: Qonhub AI 2.3.0 重构GEO评分引擎内置化(生成即优化)，客户端凭证中心三分类45平台，运营助手localhost:9901批量分发+B2B自动注册，三端workspace数据互通，缓存隔离切换免重登。
payload.summary_en: Qonhub AI 2.3.0: GEO scoring built into generation, client credential center (45 platforms across 3 categories), operator assistant for batch distribution + B2B registration, workspace-level cache isolation.
payload.upgrade_tip_zh: 升级后建议执行 php artisan migrate、php artisan optimize，并重启队列进程；企业知识库草稿生成依赖后台队列与可用 AI 模型，处理长文件前请确认 worker 正常运行。
payload.upgrade_tip_en: After upgrading, run php artisan migrate, php artisan optimize, and restart queue workers. Enterprise Knowledge drafting depends on background queues and available AI models, so verify workers before processing long source files.
